case_title: US HOLDINGS, INC. VS. JASON ROCKWELL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US HOLDINGS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, JASON DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
